description: OpenCode YOLO permission policy. Destructive rm outside the workspace is enforced by opencode/plugins/rm-outside-workspace-guard.js, not by coarse permission globs.
notes: OpenCode permissions are glob/command gates, not a filesystem sandbox.
Keep permissions broadly allow for YOLO mode.
The rm guard plugin hard-blocks rm targets outside the workspace and tells the agent to print the command for the user to run manually.
